updates.title: ITR filing AY 2026-27: Complete list of deductions and exemptions available under new tax regime
updates.summary: While the old tax regime offers a wider range of exemptions and deductions, the new tax regime still provides several tax benefits. Salaried taxpayers can benefit from the standard deduction of  ₹75,000, making income up to  ₹12.75 lakh effectively tax-free in the new regime.
